title: Historical follow-up routing still requires ordinary source-ticket leases
summary: Refresh the stage gate and related tool contract so completed-ticket `ticket_create(process_verification|post_completion_issue)` and `issue_intake` routes rely on current evidence instead of a live source-ticket lease.

title: Public repair-follow-on guidance still routes from legacy `handoff_allowed` fields
summary: Refresh restart-surface generation, `/resume`, and coordinator prompts so they route from one public repair-follow-on outcome contract instead of the legacy boolean gate.

title: Repo ticket lineage needs reconciliation after split and supersession edits
summary: Reconcile the `EXEC-011` split children to `split_scope` and repair stale `EXEC-012` lineage against `EXEC-008` through one canonical queue repair step.

title: Bootstrap proof is still failed and repo-local test tools are absent
summary: Restore the repo-local validation environment by rerunning `environment_bootstrap` and do not continue lifecycle verification until repo-local `pytest` and `ruff` are available again.
